string.text: The Staccato 2011 pistol is a high-capacity, double-stack firearm favored by competitive shooters and tactical professionals. Known for its ergonomic grip and modular design, it allows extensive customization, from adjustable sights to various slide configurations. Precision-machined components and a finely tuned trigger ensure exceptional accuracy and reliability, making it ideal for both sport and defense.\n %c[0,255,255,255]ATTACHMENTS:\n %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255] .45 suppressor
Magazine for the Stacatto 2011 pistol, houses 11 rounds of .45 ACP ammunition.
